_README: Real model-vs-model job: GPT Image 2 vs Nano Banana Pro on 5 edits (see edits/README.md). All pairs are bucket 'real' (no ground-truth winner) -- the crowd decides which edit is better. 'a' is always the gpt-image-2 output, 'b' the nano-banana-pro output; the script reads the model name from the '<edit>__<model>.png' file name. Run from inside this folder so the relative paths resolve. Bump responses_per_datapoint for tighter separation.
name: GPT Image 2 vs Nano Banana Pro -- edit quality
instruction: You are shown the ORIGINAL image and two edited versions. Which edited image most accurately applies the requested edit? Every other part of the original image should be unchanged.

pairs.edit: Edit the image so the cat is in a jungle instead.
Change the cake to a chocolate cake.
Remove the chair from the image.
